error: libcudnn.so.9: cannot open shared object file
cause: WSL or Colab missing CUDA/cuDNN runtime libraries
fix: run via tools/gnina/run_gnina_wsl.sh or set LD_LIBRARY_PATH to pip-installed nvidia/*/lib (codex round 5 wrapper)

cause: snakemake build fails on Windows due to MSVC dependency
fix: use conda env-lite on WSL or Linux; pip install snakemake-minimal works in conda envs (codex round 4 finding)

cause: Windows OS denies pytest temp directory cleanup
fix: run pytest in conda env on WSL or Linux; --basetemp inside Linux mount avoids Windows ACL conflict

error: GNINA score parser captures <CNNscore> tag instead of value
cause: prior parser read SDF property tag line
fix: use run_rcsb_redocking.py _parse_first_pose_props (numeric value on line after tag) (codex round 5 fix)

error: Kabsch-aligned RMSD hides receptor-frame placement error
cause: Kabsch removes translation/rotation before RMSD; bad poses can score artificially low
fix: use receptor-frame in-place RDKit symmetry-corrected RMSD (codex round 5 fix)

error: ligand_id column hardcoded to single value (e.g. all Gly-Val)
cause: loop variable reuse in run_replay.py generate_validation_table
fix: derive ligand_id dynamically via case_id.split('-')[1] (R3.1 fix)

error: triage helper returns no accepted seq_ids
cause: TriageDecision.verdict accepts only accept/downrank/exclude but triage.py emitted PASS/PASS_CLIPPED/FLAG/EXCLUDE
fix: emit both verdict (external) + triage_status (internal); helper filters verdict in {accept, downrank} (R2 fix)

error: BOM or CP949 encoding errors on Windows
cause: aw1_ref_manifest.tsv saved as UTF-8 with BOM; default codec is CP949
fix: read with utf-8-sig in run_replay.py and structure.load_aw1_asset (codex round 4 auto-fix)
set config.yaml triage_tool: deeptmhmm and install via biolib pip; Phobius requires user perl + binary

cause: filename inference instead of manifest lookup
fix: use load_aw1_asset(asset_id, manifest_path) which resolves canonical paths (codex round 1 manifest)

error: top-pose RMSD > 2.0 A but best-of-9 RMSD < 2.0 A
cause: CNN within-case ranking limitation; not a search failure
fix: report top-pose as primary; treat best-of-9 as diagnostic; consider dad.core.docking.select_consensus_pose (ensemble or consensus mode)

error: family bias: 3 of 4 failures in periplasmic_sugar_binding
cause: sugar SBP induced-fit + multiple binding modes + CNN training distribution bias toward rigid pockets
fix: increase sugar SBP coverage (Phase D 5 candidates: 1ABE 1EZ9 3MFU 1URP 4M3D); apply ensemble pose selection
